NDS-004.evidence: All function signatures preserved across all committed files

NDS-005.evidence: All expected-condition catches preserved without recordException/setStatus. NDS-005b correctly applied throughout.

COV-001.evidence: index.js has commit_story.app.main span. server.js has commit_story.app.main span. Resolved after 3 consecutive failures.

COV-002.evidence: All external calls wrapped in spans

COV-003.evidence: Expected-condition catches correctly exempt. Per-item-failure, swallow-and-continue, try/finally all handled correctly.

COV-004.evidence: All async I/O functions have spans

COV-005.evidence: All spans have at least 1 attribute. server.js COV-005 resolved (commit_story.mcp.transport).

COV-006.evidence: Span name collision: commit_story.journal.generate_summary used in both journal-graph.js and summary-graph.js for different operations

RST-001.evidence: All pure sync functions correctly uninstrumented

RST-003.evidence: Thin wrappers correctly uninstrumented (COV-001 override applied for entry points)

RST-004.evidence: All unexported internals correctly uninstrumented. RST-004 precedence over COV-004 correctly applied.

RST-005.evidence: No redundant manual spans on auto-instrumented functions

API-004.evidence: @opentelemetry/sdk-node in peerDependencies. Pre-existing on main, not introduced by run-7.

SCH-001.evidence: All span names semantically correct. Agent invented names following commit_story.* namespace. Advisory mode working as designed.

SCH-002.evidence: All attributes use registered keys or properly declared extensions

SCH-003.evidence: All extensions follow commit_story.* namespace convention

SCH-004.evidence: No schema removals or renames. Extend-only enforcement verified.

CDQ-001.evidence: All spans use startActiveSpan + span.end() in finally

CDQ-003.evidence: Clean catch blocks: recordException + setStatus + rethrow for unexpected errors only

CDQ-004.evidence: Attribute types correct for most files

CDQ-005.evidence: Count attributes in summary-detector.js and auto-summarize.js declared as type: string instead of type: int. String() wrapping loses numeric queryability.

CDQ-006.evidence: No expensive computation for attributes. All values are cheap derivations.

CDQ-007.evidence: Span status set correctly: ERROR only for unexpected errors

failure_classification.detail: @opentelemetry/sdk-node in peerDependencies on main. Not introduced by instrumentation.
Span name collision revealed by SCH-001 fix. Previously masked because partial files couldn't commit.
Count type mismatch revealed by SCH-001 fix. Previously masked because agent-declared extensions couldn't pass validation.
